g.text: WIRE SCHEDULE - PAGE 2: ENGINE SENSORS + THROTTLE BODY
CUT# CIRCUIT ID M130 PIN DESTINATION AWG COLOR LENGTH NOTES
#99 CKP-SIG B01 Crank Position Sensor 22 BLU/WHT/WHT 4.6ft SHIELDED 2C
#101 CMP-SIG B02 Cam Position Sensor 22 BLU/WHT/BLK 4.6ft SHIELDED 2C
#103 KNK1-SIG B07 Knock Sensor Bank 1 22 GRY 4.6ft SHIELDED 2C
#104 KNK2-SIG B13 Knock Sensor Bank 2 22 GRY/WHT 4.6ft SHIELDED 2C
#102 OPS-SIG A14 Oil Pressure Sensor 22 VIO 4.6ft
#109 IAT-SIG B03 Intake Air Temp 22 TAN 4.6ft
#110 CLT-SIG B04 Coolant Temp Sensor 22 TAN/WHT 4.6ft
#112 FPS-SIG A16 Fuel Pressure Sensor 22 VIO/BLK 4.6ft
#113 OTS-SIG B05 Oil Temperature Sensor 22 TAN/BLK 4.6ft
#4 ETB A01/A18 Electronic Throttle Body 18 ORG 4.6ft 6-PIN BUNDLE
#97 CAM PDM30:OUT15 Rear Backup Camera 20 BLU/WHT 18.4ft ROUTES THROUGH ENGINE LOOM
12 WIRES ON THIS PAGE | 16 WIRES ON PAGE 1 (IGNITION COILS + FUEL INJECTORS)
28 TOTAL ENGINE LOOM WIRES | 142.6 FT TOTAL
1. ALL SHIELDED CABLES: 22AWG 2-CONDUCTOR SHIELDED. SHIELD DRAIN TO SENSOR GROUND (M130:B15/B16), NOT CHASSIS GROUND.
2. CKP (58X) AND CMP ARE HALL EFFECT SENSORS WITH 3 PINS: 5V REF, SIGNAL, GROUND. ONLY SIGNAL WIRE RUNS INDIVIDUALLY TO ECU.
3. KNOCK SENSORS ARE 2-PIN PIEZOELECTRIC (FLAT-RESPONSE, GEN IV). NOT COMPATIBLE WITH GEN III SINGLE-WIRE RESONANT SENSORS.
4. 5V REFERENCE BUS: M130:A02 (SEN_5V0_A) FEEDS OPS, MAP, FPS, CKP, CMP, ETB TPS. A09 (SEN_5V0_B) IS BACKUP.
5. SENSOR GROUND BUS: M130:B15 (SEN_0V_A) IS THE PRIMARY STAR GROUND FOR ALL SENSOR RETURNS. B16 (SEN_0V_B) PARALLELS.
6. ETB IS COMPOUND: 2 MOTOR WIRES (HALF-BRIDGE FROM A01/A18) + 4 SENSOR WIRES (TPS1, TPS2, 5V REF, GND).
7. TEMPERATURE SENSORS (IAT, CLT, OTS) ARE 2-PIN NTC THERMISTORS: SIGNAL + GROUND. NO 5V REF NEEDED.
8. PRESSURE SENSORS (OPS, MAP, FPS) ARE 3-PIN: 5V REF, SIGNAL (0-5V), GROUND.
9. BACKUP CAMERA (#97) ROUTES THROUGH ENGINE LOOM BUT IS PDM-POWERED (NOT M130). INCLUDED FOR LOOM COMPLETENESS.
10. ALL WIRE LENGTHS ARE ESTIMATED (4.6ft ENGINE BAY). VERIFY ON VEHICLE BEFORE CUTTING.
IGNITION COILS + FUEL INJECTORS -> SEE SEC 2, PAGE 1 (NKW-K5-02-1)
SENSOR 5V REFERENCE (A02, A09) -> SEE SEC 3 (M130 PINOUT)
SENSOR GROUND (B15, B16) -> SEE SEC 12 (GROUND DISTRIBUTION)
CAN BUS (B17, B18) -> SEE SEC 11 (CAN BUS NETWORK)
BACKUP CAMERA POWER (PDM30:OUT15) -> SEE SEC 4 (PDM30 CHANNEL MAP)
